periods.name: Saturday
periods.short_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 95. Heat index values as high as 107. South wind 6 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
